hotels.description_en:
Elegant Garden and Terrace: Enshi Grand Canyon Yutan Muyun Guesthouse in Enshi features a beautiful garden and a spacious terrace. Guests can relax in the serene outdoor spaces and enjoy mountain views.
Comfortable Accommodations: The guesthouse offers family rooms equipped with air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and balconies. Each room includes a dining area, TV, and free WiFi, ensuring a comfortable stay.
Leisure Facilities: Guests can unwind in the hot tub or enjoy outdoor activities such as barbecue. The property provides free off-site private parking and a buffet breakfast with local specialities and fresh fruits.
Convenient Location: Located 51 km from Enshi Xujiaping Airport, the guesthouse is surrounded by scenic landscapes and offers easy access to local attractions.
